response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song from on-screen text: 'ビターチョコデコレーション' (Bitachoco Decoration) and 'syudou' as the artist. 2. Identified performers as IRyS and Ouro Kronii from Hololive. 3. Used search query: '"ビターチョコデコレーション" syudou Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. Obtained lyrics and mapped the video to distinct scenes: intro, song performance, transition, dialogue, and outro.
response.global_summary: A 3D animated music video featuring IRyS and Ouro Kronii performing a cover of "Bitachoco Decoration" by syudou, followed by a dialogue segment featuring Ouro Kronii.

scenes.description: Intro scene, characters are positioned within a 3D environment.
IRyS and Ouro Kronii perform "Bitachoco Decoration". Text on-screen identifies the song and artist.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
人を過度に信じないように
愛さないように期待しないように

気取らぬように目立たぬように
誰一人傷つけぬように
虐めぬように殺さぬように

Not to have too many expectations

I try not to stand out
